summary: Made two surgical seam edits: tightened the early county-office phrasing to echo the prior chapter's fluorescent-light audit pressure, and sharpened the closing tide-sheet beat so Mina's unresolved choice hands directly into Chapter 12's missed 3:17 low.
edits: Changed the county-audit description to 'fluorescent office light' for cleaner carryover from Chapter 10's closing image.
Adjusted the final line to name the 3:17 low as Mina's next unresolved choice, improving the handoff into Chapter 12.
